◎译　　名　巴西利亚，一座城市的困惑 / Brasilia Contradictions of a City
◎片　　名　Brasília, Contradições de uma Cidade
◎年　　代　1968
◎产　　地　巴西
◎类　　别　纪录片
◎语　　言　葡萄牙语
◎上映日期　1968
◎IMDb评分  7.5/10 from 154 users
◎IMDb链接  https://www.imdb.com/title/tt0210587/
◎豆瓣评分　0/10 from 0 users
◎豆瓣链接　https://movie.douban.com/subject/5086686/
◎片　　长　23分钟
◎导　　演　瓦基姆·佩德罗·德·安德拉德 Joaquim Pedro de Andrade

◎简　　介  

　　Images of Brasilia in its sixth year and interviews with different categories of people living in the capital. One question structures the documentary: could a fully planned city, created in the name of national development and the democratization of society, reproduce the inequalities and oppression that exist in other regions of the country?

director.name: 瓦基姆·佩德罗·德·安德拉德 Joaquim Pedro de Andrade
